{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud Court viewing tower
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Court viewing tower]] is a crystalline structure made of [[Forged madra]] and stained glass.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
